question: According to the percentages shown in the chart, which statement is correct?

options.A: Chrome accounts for more than 80% of usage.
options.B: Safari has the second-largest share, above 20%.
options.C: Edge and Firefox together make up more than 10% of usage.
options.D: Others account for less than 5% of usage.

explanation: From the labels, Chrome has the highest share (83%). The bars' heights are not proportional to the percentages (they use a separate 'height' value), which can mislead viewers into thinking Chrome is largest when relying on visual comparison.
